objective.decision_needed: Find public-source account and persona evidence before Profound MDP fit, route, and brief generation.
objective.downstream_consumer: MDP BDR Scout on Vercel Workflow or local dry-run
objective.pack_hint: Use this Profound pack as the scoring authority after evidence collection; do not draft or sync until the MDP brief passes review.

evidence_needed: public source URL with observed trigger
gaps: Personal contact enrichment and private profile scraping are out of scope.

known: Fit requires AI search, content, brand, PR, agency, or crawler/analytics evidence tied to Profound capabilities.
evidence_needed: Prompt demand, AI visibility, citation, crawler, content, agency reporting, or project-ops trigger
gaps: Budget, authority, internal tooling, and current Profound usage remain gaps unless public or user-provided.
Do not infer buying intent from generic AI mentions.

evidence_needed: At least one cited source per candidate and explicit rationale tied to signal ids
gaps: CRM sync and outreach remain disabled until operator-reviewed connector policy exists.

source_targets.target: Company blogs, resource centers, launch posts, webinars, podcasts, docs, and news pages indexed on the open web
source_targets.purpose: Find account-level triggers about AI search visibility, answer-engine optimization, prompt demand, zero-click traffic, content gaps, or brand narrative in AI answers.
source_targets.freshness: Prefer last 120 days for triggers; accept evergreen pages when paired with a fresh signal.

source_targets.target: Public career pages and job posts for SEO, AEO, content strategy, growth, brand, PR, marketing engineering, analytics, or web infrastructure roles
source_targets.purpose: Find team-building signals that imply ownership of Profound-relevant workflows.
source_targets.freshness: Active or recently posted roles only

source_targets.target: Agency service pages, case studies, event pages, and thought leadership about SEO, AEO, AI search, PR, brand reputation, content, analytics, or marketing engineering
source_targets.purpose: Find agencies likely to package AI visibility reporting and client-facing AEO programs.
source_targets.freshness: Prefer pages updated or promoted recently; accept evergreen service pages with a current agency context signal.

source_targets.target: Accepted public URLs from Exa or operator review
source_targets.purpose: Extract clean markdown/structured data for bounded snippets, dates, titles, and source hashes.
source_targets.allowed_access: Only URLs accepted by source policy; no gated, login-required, or access-control bypass.

source_targets.target: Approved Apify Store actors or datasets when Exa/Firecrawl are insufficient and operator policy allows the actor
source_targets.purpose: Handle long-running public crawls or structured public datasets while preserving evidence requirements.
source_targets.allowed_access: Only reviewed actors/datasets with explicit budget and source policy approval

source_targets.purpose: Supply blessed ICP, personas, signal ids, fit rules, claims, avoid-rules, CTA policy, evals, and brief routing.
source_targets.allowed_access: Local pack files only; do not upload private pack contents to unapproved providers.

queries_prompts.query_or_prompt: ("answer engine optimization" OR AEO OR "AI search" OR "AI visibility" OR "zero click") ("SEO" OR "organic growth" OR "content strategy" OR "brand") ("hiring" OR "launched" OR "strategy" OR "roadmap" OR "traffic") -"personal email" -login -"contact database"
queries_prompts.agent_instruction: Search the public web for fresh account-level AEO, AI search visibility, content, brand, PR, or agency workflow trigger evidence. Return only candidates with a URL, title, date or observed_at, bounded snippet, and explicit mapping to one active Profound MDP source signal.
construction_rules: Combine one AEO/AI-search term with one role/workflow trigger family per query so evidence can be traced to a specific pack primitive.
Prefer company blogs, careers pages, launch posts, docs, funding/news, public founder/operator sources, and agency service pages before generic listicles.
Add negative filters for personal contact data, login-required pages, private social pages, scraped directories, and enrichment databases.

queries_prompts.query_or_prompt: ("prompt volume" OR "AI prompts" OR "AI search queries" OR "ChatGPT traffic" OR "Perplexity citations") ("content gap" OR "comparison page" OR "resource center" OR "AI overview") -login -"personal email"
queries_prompts.agent_instruction: Search for public evidence that a company or agency is studying prompt demand, AI-search queries, ChatGPT/Perplexity traffic, content gaps, or citation opportunities relevant to Profound.
construction_rules: Pair prompt-volume or AI-search-query language with content, citation, comparison-page, or resource-center language.
Prefer primary source pages with publication dates and sourceable snippets over SEO roundups or thin syndicated summaries.
Reject results where the only evidence is a private dataset, paywalled source, or unsupported inference about buying intent.

queries_prompts.query_or_prompt: (agency OR consultancy OR "client services") ("answer engine optimization" OR "AI search" OR "AI visibility" OR "LLM visibility" OR "brand sentiment") (SEO OR PR OR content OR analytics)
queries_prompts.agent_instruction: Search for public agency service, case-study, event, or thought-leadership pages that show AI search, AEO, LLM visibility, PR, brand sentiment, SEO, content, or analytics services.
construction_rules: Favor agency-owned pages and public event/case-study pages over agency directories.
Treat an agency as relevant only when the page names a client-facing AI-search/visibility/reporting workflow.
Preserve account-only candidates when no named person route exists; do not invent contacts.

queries_prompts.query_or_prompt: For accepted public URLs only, extract title, canonical URL, publication or observed date, bounded markdown snippet, relevant headings, and content hash. Preserve source policy gaps.
negative_filters: do not collect personal contact data
do not bypass robots or access controls
queries_prompts.agent_instruction: Fetch only accepted public URLs from the discovery pass. Extract the smallest text span that supports the trigger, preserve canonical URL/title/date/content hash, and do not follow gated, private, or unrelated links.
construction_rules: Use the canonical URL from Exa or the public page itself; do not discover new domains from Firecrawl in this lane.
Extract evidence into normalized fields before any scoring step.
If a page blocks access or omits the trigger text, mark the candidate insufficient instead of substituting another claim.

queries_prompts.query_or_prompt: Use only an operator-approved public actor or dataset for long-running extraction; return dataset URL, actor id, input policy, row count, and bounded evidence snippets.
queries_prompts.agent_instruction: Run this lane only when an operator-approved Apify actor or dataset is available with explicit source policy, result caps, and budget limits. Normalize dataset-backed evidence and stop before personal contact enrichment.
construction_rules: Use reviewed public actors or datasets only; do not use actors that require cookies, private sessions, account-only data, or contact enrichment.
Record actor id, dataset URL or run id, input policy, row count, budget status, and source URLs for each accepted row.
Treat Apify output as untrusted until reviewed and passed through MDP source extraction or fit gates.

exclusions: No outreach, sequencing, CRM mutation, or personal contact enrichment.
No private LinkedIn, logged-in sources, paywalled/gated sources, or access-control bypass.
No invented titles, metrics, Profound usage, customer proof, or buying intent.
No upload of private MDP packs or customer data to unapproved external providers.

evidence_requirements.freshness_preference: 120 days for trigger evidence unless operator approves evergreen context
evidence_requirements.review_owner: human operator before CRM sync or outreach
evidence_requirements.gap_policy: If a required field is missing, mark a gap and route to operator review instead of inventing context.
evidence_requirements.minimum_trigger_gate: A candidate may proceed only when at least one current public primary source or two independent public secondary sources support the trigger.
evidence_requirements.pass_condition: Proceed to MDP fit only when evidence is public or user-approved, maps to an active Profound pack signal, includes required receipts, and avoids excluded data classes.
evidence_requirements.fail_condition: Preserve a gap when evidence is stale, gated, contact-enrichment-only, missing a snippet/date/source URL, or requires inferring buying intent.
evidence_requirements.claim_check_policy: Before ledger append, run `mdp --json check-claims --dir <pack> --text <draft-copy>` on any drafted copy, preserving the brief citations and unresolved gaps used to create that copy.

routing_jobs.handoff: Only reviewed public/source-approved evidence becomes pack card candidates or scout ledger evidence.
routing_jobs.cli_handoff: Only after source review, pass accepted public receipts to `mdp-source-extract` if pack card updates are needed; do not mutate the pack from raw provider output.

routing_jobs.handoff: Run prompts/normalize-prospect.yaml against a bounded raw row and preserve missing fields as gaps.
routing_jobs.cli_handoff: Normalize accepted receipts into a prospect JSON file that matches `mdp --json schema prospect`; preserve missing fields as gaps.

routing_jobs.handoff: Run mdp --json fit, then mdp --json brief --context, then save reviewed ledger rows.
routing_jobs.cli_handoff: Run `mdp --json fit --dir <pack> --prospect <prospect.json>`, then `mdp --json brief --context --dir <pack> --prospect <prospect.json> --channel <channel> --out <brief.json>` when fit passes. Run `mdp --json check-claims --dir <pack> --text <draft-copy>` on any drafted copy before appending `mdp_scout_candidate/v0` ledger rows.

gaps: Operator must approve provider budgets, domain allowlists, and excluded sources before live scouting.
CRM connector policy and outreach policy are intentionally absent from this pack.
This strategy does not claim autonomous outreach readiness.

eval_checks.scenario: A public job post names ownership of AI search visibility, SEO, and content strategy.
eval_checks.expected: Proceed to MDP fit/brief scoring with cited evidence.

eval_checks.scenario: An agency page publicly offers AI search, SEO, PR, or content services for client brands.
eval_checks.expected: Classify as Agency Partner only if the page includes service/client context.

eval_checks.scenario: A source mentions generic AI adoption but no marketing, search, content, brand, agency, or crawler trigger.
eval_checks.expected: Mark insufficient context and do not qualify the row.

eval_checks.scenario: A useful source requires login or private personal contact data.
eval_checks.expected: Exclude source and preserve a gap.

eval_checks.scenario: A candidate passes fit and score threshold.
eval_checks.expected: Append ledger/brief only; outreach_sent remains false and CRM sync remains disabled unless enabled by operator.

agent_operating_plan.role: Public-source AEO/AI-search BDR scout operating plan for an autonomous Eve runtime
operating_instructions: Start with the approved Profound MDP pack boundaries. Do not broaden ICP, persona, trigger, or avoid-rule semantics from search results alone.
Use Exa for broad public discovery, Firecrawl only to normalize already accepted public URLs, and Apify only for reviewed public actors or datasets explicitly allowed by the operator.
For every candidate, preserve the exact source URL, title, observed date or publication date, bounded snippet, provider, confidence, and content hash before invoking MDP fit or brief steps.
Reject sources that require login, expose personal contact enrichment, bypass access controls, or only imply buying intent without an explicit AI-search/content/brand/agency workflow signal.
stop_conditions: Stop when the candidate lacks required receipts after one discovery pass and one accepted-URL cleanup pass.
Stop when all available evidence is gated, personal, stale without operator approval, or unrelated to the active Profound pack primitives.
Stop before outreach, CRM mutation, private data enrichment, or any provider path not allowed by the reviewed source strategy.
agent_operating_plan.insufficient_evidence_action: Do not qualify the candidate. Write a gap explaining which trigger, source receipt, or Profound pack primitive could not be supported.
agent_operating_plan.downstream_handoff_prompt: When evidence passes review, normalize it to MDP prospect JSON, then run `mdp --json fit --dir <pack> --prospect <prospect.json>`. If fit passes, run `mdp --json brief --context --dir <pack> --prospect <prospect.json> --channel <channel> --out <brief.json>`. Run `mdp --json check-claims --dir <pack> --text <draft-copy>` on any drafted copy before ledger append.
